description: Centered, minimal layout with large typography. Content unfolds as a scrollable narrative — headline, problem, solution, proof, CTA.

css_layout_rules..hero-centered: min-height: 85vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 6rem 0 4rem;
css_layout_rules..hero-headline-xl: font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.04em; max-width: 800px;
css_layout_rules..problem-statement: padding: 6rem 0; text-align: center; max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto;
css_layout_rules..results-numbers: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; padding: 4rem 0; text-align: center;
css_layout_rules..pricing-simple: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; padding: 4rem 0;
